name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE TRIOMPHE Kelly Handbag👜
New Triomphe Clutch, Full of High-end Feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram color scheme, etc... all exude incomparable high-end feel❤️ Kelly's classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, all showing aesthetic charm🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113 Grey Color
Dimensions: 20.5x13x8 (Comes with original packaging)
